'''Aleema Finn''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Omwati/Legends|Omwati]].

==Biography==
Aleema and her husband, [[Kodo Finn]], were attacked by the [[Nashtah Gang]] who worked indirectly for [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]], shortly after leaving a dining establishment on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Kodo offered [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] but the leader of the gang, a [[Duros/Legends|Duros]], still expressed a desire to cause harm to the two [[Omwati/Legends|Omwati]] as a message to Kodo from Xizor for he and his wife to keep silent. [[Ekria/Legends|Ekria]], [[Zonder/Legends|Zonder]] and [[Drake Lo'gaan/Legends|Drake Lo'gaan]] came to their rescue, however not before the Duros was able to hit Kodo once. The punch resulted in fourth-stage burns in the shape of the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] symbol. Kodo was branded.
